title: Brutalist Furniture
description: A Brutalist furniture pack to work with the "Grand Design"﻿ architecture mod or any architecture mod.
body:
A Brutalist furniture pack to work with the "Grand Design"﻿ architecture mod or any architecture mod, for Forge 1.20.1.

It includes:

Tables, including a modular table that extends when added together

Chairs, including a chair entity you can sit on

Sofa chairs in 8 colours

Sofas in 8 colours

Lamps that turn on and off with a right-click

Shelves

A block, slab and stair

3 Sculptures
